theorem: In axis k[y][x] form, leading x-degree N>=2 is isolated by Wronskian [x^{2N-1}]=N W(A_N,B_N) independent of lower tower; W(A_N,B_N)=0 gives linear dependence; A_N=0 shown only in the B_N=0, zero-tower slice (and B_N const/E_x). Iteration yields deg_x(f)<=1, then tame. Degree-free in form; machine y-deg<=dy.
plane_jc_assembly: G1 pure-power (Poisson-Hankel) + GL2 axis + this degfree axis triangularization + Jung-van der Kulk => plane JC.
